name: Feywild
author: ImAsra
description: Forest green and earthy tones neumorphic theme with warm moss accents.

1.2.9: Fix: collapsed sidebar nav buttons are now square and icon-sized.
1.2.8: Fix: the album rail's prev/next arrows work again. The card shadow now gets room inside the rail instead of switching off its overflow, which had disabled the arrows.
1.2.7: Fix: allow album-card box-shadow glow to render above album cards (overflow: visible).
Add breathing room for first row of album cards.
